name: Hardwood Slim-Fit Lilac Oxford Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la Rangi ya Zambarau Hafifu la Hardwood
description: Hardwood slim-fit lilac oxford shirt in soft cotton. Clean point collar, chest pocket and subtle embroidery detail. Cool, airy tone that pairs effortlessly with grey, navy or black trousers for the office or a smart-casual event.
